text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By now, Eishin Flash has a number of victories
under her belt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I'm sorting through her race history, I realize
something...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, I take her to the Tokyo Racecourse.
choice_data_list: You've won a lot of G1 races here.
You've won a lot of G1 races here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only has she won many high-level G1 races,
she's really made a name for herself here at the
Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Despite remembering every race I've run, I didn't
realize I had achieved so much at the Tokyo
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My most recent memory is... the autumn Tenno
Sho from my senior year.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I was able to win a race that my parents were
present to watch.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You were watching me as well. I could tell how
happy you were that day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That alone triggered so many memories we
shared... Thanking you came so naturally that
day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I shall remember that moment for as long as I live.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: That's how strong an impression it left on me.
choice_data_list: You were absolutely stunning that day.
You were absolutely stunning that day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you ever so much. I'm touched.
choice_data_list: Let's use today to walk down memory lane.
